title: Worried About Overheating Smart Glasses? This Tiny Chip Could Keep Them Cool
summary: As smart glasses pack in more computing power, a California company has developed a cooling chip that's small enough to fit inside the frames to prevent overheating. However, the chip isn’t a traditional tiny fan that spins.
